ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Translates the selected text from the "From language" to the "To language".
ast.target: 将选中的文本从“源语言”翻译成“目标语言”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The target language can be selected by suggestion modal. The target language can be selected by suggestion modal. The selection will be replaced by the translation.
ast.target: 目标语言可通过建议模态框选择。目标语言可通过建议模态框选择。选中的文本将被翻译结果替换。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The source and target languages can be selected by suggestion modal. The target language can be selected by suggestion modal. The selection will be replaced by the translation.
ast.target: 源语言和目标语言均可通过建议模态框选择。目标语言可通过建议模态框选择。选中的文本将被翻译结果替换。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The target language can be selected by suggestion modal. The translation will be appended to the selection.
ast.target: 目标语言可通过建议模态框选择。翻译结果将追加到选中文本之后。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The language from which to translate.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets whether the translated text should lean towards formal or informal language.
ast.target: 设置翻译文本应偏向正式或非正式语言。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the "To language" in the status bar.
ast.target: 在状态栏中选择“目标语言”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Get one for free at https://deepl.com/pro.
ast.target: 可在 https://deepl.com/pro 免费获取一个。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to use the DeepL Pro API or the DeepL Free API.
ast.target: 是否使用 DeepL Pro API 或 DeepL 免费 API。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 翻译选中文本：目标语言

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Translate selection: From a language to another
ast.target: 翻译选中文本：从一种语言到另一种语言

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Translate selection: To language and append to selection
ast.target: 翻译选中文本：目标语言并追加到选中文本之后

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An unknown error occured. See console for details.
ast.target: 发生未知错误。详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Translate selection: To language and append to selection
ast.target: 翻译选中文本：目标语言并追加到选中文本之后

ast.name: name
ast.target: 翻译选中文本：目标语言
